# shell

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: App shell for the Website (equin public site). Registers the /website app entry and the landing pane, owns the shared site toolbar (wordmark + nav zones) every site pane opts into, and defines the Website.Section landing slot.
- Web:
  - Slots: `Website.Section` ← `apps.website.demos.theme-toy`, `apps.website.landing.cta`, `apps.website.landing.features`, `apps.website.landing.hero`, `WebsiteToolbar.Start` ← `apps.website.shell`, `WebsiteToolbar.End` ← `apps.website.blog.site`, `apps.website.downloads`, `landingPane.Actions`
  - Contributes: `Apps.App` "equin" → `WebsiteLayout`, `blogListPane.Start` "wordmark" → `WebsiteWordmark`, `Pane.Register` "website-landing"
  - Uses: `apps-core.Apps`, `apps-core/app-icon.mdAppIcon`, `layouts/full-pane.FullPane`, `primitives/css/fill.Fill`, `primitives/css/spacing.Inset`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.Button`, `primitives/pane-toolbar.definePaneToolbar`, `primitives/pane.Pane`, `primitives/pane.PaneChrome`, `primitives/pane.useOpenPane`, `primitives/slot-render.defineRenderSlot`
  - Exports: Values: `landingPane`, `Website`, `WebsiteNavLink`, `WebsitePage`, `WebsiteToolbar`
- Core:
  - Uses: `primitives/pane.defineApp`
  - Exports: Values: `websiteApp`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `apps/website/blog/site`, `apps/website/demos/theme-toy`, `apps/website/downloads`, `apps/website/landing/cta`, `apps/website/landing/features`, `apps/website/landing/hero`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
